summary: Bash: Check if db directory exists
input_snippet: {"command": "ls projects/wiki/data/db/ 2>/dev/null && echo \"---exists---\" || echo \"---deleted---\"", "description": "Check if db directory exists"}

summary: Bash: Check for schema and context files
input_snippet: {"command": "find projects/wiki/data/ -name \"characters.json\" 2>/dev/null && echo \"---\" && find memory/ -name \"wiki-characters-schema*\" 2>/dev/null && echo \"---\" && find projects/wiki/ -name \"CONTEXT.md\" 2>/dev/null", "description": "Check for schema and context files"}
